rules.name: Yes_Eligible_for_CU_Agent_Open_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12) AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6 OR 13) AND 7 AND 8 AND 9
rules.label: Yes, Eligible for CU Agent (Open Task)

decisions.name: Eligible_for_CU_Agent_Open_Task_Contact
decisions.label: Eligible for CU Agent (Open Task - Contact)?

rules.name: Yes_Eligible_for_CU_Agent_Open_Task_Contact
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 14 OR 15 OR 16) AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6 OR 17) AND 7 AND ((8 AND 9) OR 10 OR 11) AND 12 AND 13
rules.label: Yes, Eligible for CU Agent (Open Task - Contact)

decisions.name: Rule_COD_Contact_Owner_Division_not_Integration_Sales_Operation
decisions.label: *Rule (COD)* - Contact Owner Division not Integration/Sales Operation

decisions.description: MIS-5724 - Changed CU logic to run on last activity by GTM MIS-4891
decisions.name: Rule_CTT_Contact_Task_Type
decisions.label: *Rule (CTT)* - Contact Task Type

rules.name: Type_B_SF_Admin_Open_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7) AND ((8 AND (NOT 9)) OR 9) AND (NOT 10) AND (NOT 11)
rules.label: Type B - SF Admin Open Task

rules.name: Type_A_Contact_Owner_Open_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (((1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 18) AND (4 OR 19)) OR (5 OR 6) OR ((NOT 4) AND (NOT 19) AND ((7 AND 8) OR (9 AND 10)) AND 11 AND 12) OR ((7 AND 8) AND (13 OR 14)) OR 15 OR 16) AND 17
rules.label: Type A - Contact Owner Open Task

decisions.name: Rule_LOD_Lead_Owner_Division_not_Integration_Sales_Operation
decisions.label: *Rule (LOD)* - Lead Owner Division not Integration/Sales Operation

Flow.description: MIS-8441 - Opened CU Agent to A, B, C leads and updated conditions MIS-8138 - CU Agent open to D and contacts, Excluded Taiwan MIS-8106 - Adjusted Eligible for CU Agent to VGR MIS-8010 CU forms - new description field for GTM MIS-7957 - Added Eligible for CU Agent logic MIS-7828 - Added HTML template reset MIS-7852 - Update Contact Us Task Logic MIS-7783 - Added Account CS Email MIS-7852 - Update Contact Us Task Logic MIS-7371 - Added FitScore E to Lead Logic MIS-5724 - Changed logic to run on last activity by GTM MIS-5531 - Added "D" fit score to Lead MIS-5469 MIS-5356 MIS-5271 MIS-5202 MIS-4891
Flow.label: Task - Generic - Create "Contact Us" Task

recordLookups.description: MIS-8010 CU forms - new description field for GTM
recordLookups.name: Get_CU_Hook_Description
recordLookups.label: Get CU Hook Description

textTemplates.name: Email_Body_Contact
textTemplates.text:
New CU has been submitted:

CU Details:
Status: Submitted
Due Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}
CU Type: {!IN_Last_Contact_Us_Type}
Subject: {!IN_Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject}
Message: {!IN_Last_Contact_Us_Form_Message}
Form Location URL: {!IN_Form_Location_URL}

Contact Details:
Contact Created Date: {!Contact_Created_Date}
Full Name: {!IN_Full_Name}
Pro User Type: {!Get_Contact.fr_Pro_User_Type__c}
Email: {!IN_Email}
Department: {!IN_Department}
Title: {!IN_Title}
Phone: {!IN_Phone}
Fit Score: {!IN_SW_Fit_Score}
How to Contact: {!IN_How_to_Contact_User_Primary}
LinkedIn Profile: {!IN_LinkedIn_Profile}
Website Domain: {!IN_Website_Domain}

Company Details:
Account: {!Get_Contact.Account.Name}
Account Stage: {!Get_Contact.Account.Stage__c}
Base Product: {!Get_Contact.Account.Base_Product__c}
ARR: {!Get_Contact.Account.fr_ARR__c}
Next Renewal Date: {!Get_Contact.Next_Renewal_Date__c}
Country: {!Get_Contact.Account.BillingCountry}
SW Industry: {!Get_Contact.Account.SW_Industry__c}
Strategic Pod: {!Get_Contact.Account.Strategic_Pod__c}
Strategic Region: {!Get_Contact.Account.Strategic_Region__c}

textTemplates.name: Email_Body_Lead
textTemplates.text:
New CU has been submitted:

CU Details:
Status: Submitted
Due Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}
CU Type: {!IN_Last_Contact_Us_Type}
Subject: {!IN_Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject}
Message: {!IN_Last_Contact_Us_Form_Message}
Form Location URL: {!IN_Form_Location_URL}

Lead Details:
Name: {!IN_Full_Name}
Email: {!IN_Email}
Phone: {!IN_Phone}
Current Registration Type: {!IN_Current_Registration_Type}
Fit Score: {!IN_SW_Fit_Score}
Department: {!IN_Department}
Title: {!IN_Title}
How to Contact: {!IN_How_to_Contact_User_Primary}
LinkedIn Profile: {!IN_LinkedIn_Profile}
Website Domain: {!IN_Website_Domain}

Company Details:
Company: {!IN_Company}
Country: {!IN_Country}
SW Industry: {!IN_SW_Industry}

textTemplates.name: Email_Subject_Contact
textTemplates.text: You have a new CU by {!IN_Email} from Account: {!Get_Contact.Account.Name}

textTemplates.name: Email_Subject_Lead
textTemplates.text: You have a new CU by {!IN_Email} from Company: {!IN_Company}
